name: Slack Notifier
purpose: Sends Slack notifications for approvals, task assignments, OKR updates, and weekly digests. Posts to channels or sends direct messages when Friday takes actions that require human awareness.
trigger_conditions: User asks Friday to post a message to Slack or notify a channel.
User asks Friday to send a direct message via Slack.
An approval, task assignment, or OKR update requires human notification.
anti_trigger_conditions: No Slack notification or message sending is required.
